source_jobs.description:
<p>Hey, Omaha! Ready to run with the Pack? <img style="max-width: 100%;" src="https://a.slack-edge.com/production-standard-emoji-assets/16.0/apple-medium/1f43a@2x.png" alt=":wolf:" aria-label="wolf emoji" data-stringify-emoji=":wolf:"><br><br>Whether you're looking to level up your career, curious about what we do, or just want to connect with some of the sharpest minds in the industry, we want to meet you.<br><br><span style="text-decoration: underline;">Here are the details:</span></p>
<p>When: Thursday, July 9th | 4:30 PM – 6:30 PM<br>Where: Hurrdat Sports Bar &amp; Grill (La Vista, NE) – We’ll be out on the patio!&nbsp;<br><br>Can’t make it out, but still want to join the Pack? We’re always looking for top-tier talent. Send your resume over to <a href="mailto:careers@darkwolf.io" target="_blank">careers@darkwolf.io</a>.<br><br>See you there!<br><br></p>
